stdout:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 3ea9a6d..3011580 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -66,8 +66,12 @@ To smoke-test installation without touching real agent homes, use scratch homes
 
 ```bash
 SCRATCH="$(mktemp -d)"
-CODEX_HOME="$SCRATCH/Codex Home With Spaces" CLAUDE_HOME="$SCRATCH/ClaudeHome" ./install.sh all
-python "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/scripts/validate_handoff.py" \
+export CODEX_HOME="$SCRATCH/Codex Home With Spaces"
+export CLAUDE_HOME="$SCRATCH/ClaudeHome"
+PYTHON="${PYTHON:-python3}"
+command -v "$PYTHON" >/dev/null 2>&1 || PYTHON="python"
+./install.sh all
+"$PYTHON" "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/scripts/validate_handoff.py" \
   --root "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/templates" \
   --contract "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/templates/.github/project_handoff_contract.json" \
   --json

cmd:
set -euo pipefail
SCRATCH="$(mktemp -d)"
export CODEX_HOME="$SCRATCH/Codex Home With Spaces"
export CLAUDE_HOME="$SCRATCH/ClaudeHome"
PYTHON="${PYTHON:-python3}"
command -v "$PYTHON" >/dev/null 2>&1 || PYTHON="python"
./install.sh all
"$PYTHON" "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/scripts/validate_handoff.py"   --root "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/templates"   --contract "$CODEX_HOME/skills/project-init/templates/.github/project_handoff_contract.json"   --json
printf '
PYTHON_USED=%s
' "$PYTHON"
printf 'CODEX_HOME=%s
' "$CODEX_HOME"
printf 'CLAUDE_HOME=%s
' "$CLAUDE_HOME"
stdout:
Usage: ./install.sh [all|codex|claude]

Installs project-init to agent skill homes:
  codex   /Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init
  claude  /ClaudeHome/skills/project-init
  all     both targets (default)

Environment overrides:
  CODEX_HOME   default: /home/gomay/.codex
  CLAUDE_HOME  default: /home/gomay/.claude

Safety note: install overwrites SKILL.md, templates/, and scripts/ inside
only the target project-init skill directory shown above.
Installing project-init to: /Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init
Overwrite scope: /Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init/SKILL.md, /Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init/templates/, /Codex Home With Spaces/skills/project-init/scripts/
